title: clethra canescens var. clementis
intro: Clethra canescens var. clementis, also known as the sweet pepperbush, is a type of flowering shrub native to the southeastern United States. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and antitussive properties. The health benefits of Clethra canescens var. clementis include reducing inflammation, alleviating congestion, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea or infused oil for its herbal benefits, which can be used to promote relaxation and relieve respiratory symptoms.
